militaryService: Likely fought in the American Revolutionary War
thompson-patriarch.notes: The patriarch is likely the father of Samuel, Calvin (1771), and Charles (1783). His first name is unknown. Family tradition of Rev. War service may apply to him.

fred-e-thompson-1871.notes: M.D. from Hahnemann Medical College (1902). Homeopathic physician in Detroit. Member of Homeopathic Medical Society of Michigan; Mason; Forester; Knight of the Maccabees. Buried at Temple of Memories, 1st floor, Section 159. Find a Grave #143791920.

rollin-hawkins-1890.notes: Son of Nettie Serene Thompson & Harvey Hawkins.

harry-hawkins-1894.notes: Son of Nettie Serene Thompson & Harvey Hawkins.

maxwell-thompson-1905.notes: Died in early childhood (not infancy). Son of James Herbert Thompson & Minnie Elizabeth Ardis.

charlotte-ann-thompson-1909.notes: Daughter of James Herbert Thompson & Minnie Elizabeth Ardis.

fred-holmes-thompson.notes: Dartmouth graduate. Suffered from asthma, which prompted move to dry climate in Wagon Mound, NM. Married Elanor (surname unknown).

dorothy-elizabeth-thompson.notes: m. William Landis. Had cottage at Lake of Bays ('Mont-Land').

millicent-betts-thompson.notes: Named after great-great-grandmother Millicent Ann Betts. Find a Grave #188803217. Died at Borgess Medical Center, Kalamazoo. Cremated.

fritz-thompson.notes: Son of Fred Holmes Thompson & Elanor. 'Fritz' is a nickname; legal name unknown.

jimbo-thompson.notes: Son of Fred Holmes Thompson & Elanor. 'Jimbo' is a nickname; legal name unknown.

william-landis-jr.notes: Known as 'Judge'. Son of Dorothy Elizabeth Thompson & William Landis.

stephen-landis.notes: Son of Dorothy Elizabeth Thompson & William Landis.

millicent-landis.notes: Daughter of Dorothy Elizabeth Thompson & William Landis.

henry-gies-hessen.notes: NOT the documented Johann Heinrich Gies (1798-1865) who married Maria Anna Schmittdiel. Different person with same surname/origin region. Part of Neustaedter Immigration wave to Detroit.

william-smyth.notes: Irish origin; fled Ireland during Tithe War era. Settled in Chatham, Ontario. Wikipedia confirms via son Henry's article.

isabella-smyth-1838.notes: First married Mr. Kitchen (~1863, husband died ~1870). Second married Thomas Holmes (1873).

henry-smyth-1841.notes: Wikipedia article; m. 1862 Julia O'Brien. Bell Farm investor. Mayor of Chatham. MP for Kent.

mary-smyth-1843.notes: m. 1862 John Northwood. Find a Grave #125690670.

samuel-holmes.notes: Find a Grave #85191386 lists him as father of Thomas Holmes.

sources: Commemorative Biographical Record of Kent County

jane-hampson.notes: Possibly 'Mary Jane Hampson' per FamilySearch record for Thomas Holmes Jr. Presumed deceased before 1873 (Thomas remarried).

richard-w-holmes.notes: Son of Thomas Holmes & Jane Hampson.

lizzie-holmes.notes: m. H. King. Daughter: Meda 'Gyps' King.

sarah-melinda-holmes.notes: NEW — Not in original family tree photos. Discovered via Find a Grave #85191386. m. Richard Stidson.

henry-smyth-holmes.notes: CORRECTED: Wife was Elizabeth Armstrong (1879-1916), NOT 'Winifred' as stated in original tree. 'Winifred' was his DAUGHTER (Winnifred Martin Holmes, 1904-1997). 'C.D. Wooley' from original tree remains unidentified. Children: Henry Jr. (1902), Winnifred Martin (1904-1997), Frederick George (1905-1905, infant), Reginald Theodore (1906-1963). FamilySearch (via Reginald Theodore Holmes profile L8BV-6CF).

isabella-edna-holmes-1879.notes: Birth year corrected from 1878 to 1879 (March 10). Find a Grave #143791786. m. 27 Oct 1903 Fred Eugene Thompson, M.D.

louisa-ives-holmes.notes: m. John Hallam. Children: Isabel (m. Richard Carr), John Jr., Robert.

meda-gyps-king.notes: Daughter of Lizzie Holmes & H. King. Married Sidney Russell Northwood. Nickname 'Gyps'.

residences.place: Grosse Pointe / St. Clair Shores, Michigan

donald-montgomery.notes: Parents UNKNOWN. Died at Brighton Hall Nursing Center. Note unusual spelling 'Malcom' (not Malcolm) consistent across all family documents. Find a Grave #130257550. Bought Attica Ledger Tribune Jan 1952, sold May 1963. Moved to New Haven for Allen County Times and Moon Printing Company.

lea-ann-montgomery.notes: m. Robert Dawson. Eldest child of Donald & Millicent Montgomery.

dorothy-mary-montgomery.notes: m. Paul K. Predecki, Ph.D. (MIT). Paul is Adjunct Emeritus Professor at University of Denver.

david-michael-montgomery.notes: No spouse or children listed in family documents.

scott-dawson.notes: Son of Lea Ann Montgomery & Robert Dawson.

daniel-predecki.notes: Son of Dorothy Mary Montgomery & Paul Predecki. Nicknamed 'Dan'.

haley-montgomery.notes: Daughter of James Eugene Montgomery & Norine Eva Rowe.

jennifer-montgomery.notes: Daughter of James Eugene Montgomery & Norine Eva Rowe. Nicknamed 'Jenni'.

john-northwood.notes: Find a Grave #125690365. Family home at 11 Victoria Avenue, Chatham. Acquired land for Canadian Pacific Railroad development.

harry-northwood.notes: Eldest child. Had cottages at Lake of Bays. Called 'Uncle Ed' in family notes (middle name 'Edward' unverified). m. N. Pedlar. Children: Helen (m. Chisholm), Kathleen (m. Edmonson Moore), Grace (m. Dobson).

edgar-burton-northwood.notes: NEW — Not in original family tree. 2nd child of John & Mary Northwood. Confirmed by CK Physician Tribute.

occupation: Medical Officer of Health for Chatham (1932-1943)
education: M.B., University of Toronto Faculty of Medicine (1895, honors)
alfred-northwood.notes: m. 22 May 1901 Monica Hinde (b. 1877, England; d. 15 Sep 1965). Life member of Kent Club; 32nd degree Mason; Canadian Club member. Died in his sleep of heart attack. Find a Grave #110875779. No children recorded. Resided at 11 Victoria Avenue, Chatham (family home).

mame-northwood.notes: Real name Mary E. Northwood; 'Mame' was nickname. Find a Grave #175548594.

sidney-northwood.notes: Moved to Wagon Mound, NM in 1904, connected to brother Alfred's medical practice. m. Meda 'Gyps' King.

dorothy-northwood.notes: Nurse. Immigrated to Wagon Mound, NM on Jan 5, 1904. 1st owner of the Landis cottage at Lake of Bays.

minnie-may-smith-1883.notes: m. Edward Frost Rowe. Confirmed as mother of George H. Rowe by his obituary ('Minnie (Smith) Rowe').

laura-flossie-smith-1891.notes: m. John E. Livingstone. Shares Jan 12 birthday with sister Minnie May Smith.

edward-frost-rowe-1878.notes: Father of Irene & George. George H. Rowe obituary explicitly identifies parents as 'Edward F. Rowe and Minnie (Smith) Rowe'.

clyde-jones-1891.burialPlace: Gracelawn Cemetery, Flint, Genesee County, Michigan
clyde-jones-1891.notes: Death year CORRECTED from 1930 to 1932. First wife: Georgie May Schoff (1892-1953); son from first marriage: Rollin Elwood Jones (1917-1917, infant). m.2 Irene Rowe (6/12/1926). Find a Grave #94327812.

clyde-edward-jones-1930.notes: Son of Clyde Sylvester Jones & Irene Rowe. m. 4/13/1952 Margaret Marie Crissey.

marilyn-jones-1959.notes: Daughter of Clyde Edward Jones & Margaret Marie Crissey.

sharon-jones.notes: Name and birth date partially cut off in family photo. Possibly 'Shar[on?]'. Daughter of Clyde Edward Jones & Margaret Marie Crissey.

mae-livingstone-1915.notes: Daughter of Laura Flossie Smith & John E. Livingstone. m. Roger Hardenbergh.

gretchen-hardenbergh-1943.notes: Daughter of Mae Livingstone & Roger Hardenbergh.

jon-hardenbergh-1950.notes: Son of Mae Livingstone & Roger Hardenbergh.

george-h-rowe-1919.notes: NEW — Son of Edward Frost Rowe & Minnie May Smith. Not shown in original family photo charts. m. 4/14/1941 Evaleen Bardwell. George H. Rowe obituary (2007, Kalamazoo Gazette) explicitly identifies parents.

George H. Rowe obituary (2007, Flint Journal)

evaleen-bardwell-1918.notes: NEW — Twin daughter of Charles & Ruth (Robinette) Bardwell. Nicknamed 'Eva'. m. George H. Rowe (4/14/1941). Wife of the late George H. Rowe, SSgt US Army.

dale-rowe.notes: Son of George H. Rowe & Evaleen Bardwell. m. Ellen.

georgene-rowe-wright.notes: Daughter of George H. Rowe & Evaleen Bardwell. m. Alan Wright.

edward-f-rowe-jr.notes: Son of George H. Rowe & Evaleen Bardwell. Named after grandfather Edward Frost Rowe. m. Stephanie.

norine-eva-rowe.notes: Granddaughter of Edward Frost Rowe through his son George H. Rowe. m. James Eugene Montgomery. Birth year estimated ~1953.

j-glass.notes: Spouse of Betsy Thompson. Known only by initial.

jos-bruner.notes: Spouse of Charles E. Thompson. 'Jos.' likely Josephine.

elanor-thompson.notes: Spouse of Fred Holmes Thompson. Surname unknown.

william-landis.notes: Spouse of Dorothy Elizabeth Thompson. Cottage 'Mont-Land' at Lake of Bays.

e-chamberlain-2.notes: Spouse of Sally Maria Thompson (1834). May or may not be same person as E. Chamberlain who married Jane Thompson.

mr-kitchen.notes: First husband of Isabella Smyth (~1863, died ~1870). First name unknown.

elizabeth-armstrong.notes: Wife of Henry Smyth Holmes. NOT the 'Winifred' from original tree.

h-king.notes: Spouse of Lizzie Holmes. Father of Meda 'Gyps' King.

james-mccrory.notes: Rev. James McCrory of Illinois. Spouse of Julia Ann Holmes.

mary-jane-jones.notes: m. 1871 Thomas Holmes Jr. in Chatham, Ontario.

henry-s-holmes-jr.notes: Son of Henry Smyth Holmes & Elizabeth Armstrong. Henry Smyth Holmes Jr.

winnifred-martin-holmes.notes: Daughter of Henry Smyth Holmes & Elizabeth Armstrong. Originally misidentified as Henry's spouse in family tree photos.

frederick-george-holmes.notes: Son of Henry Smyth Holmes & Elizabeth Armstrong. Died in infancy.

reginald-theodore-holmes.notes: Son of Henry Smyth Holmes & Elizabeth Armstrong. FamilySearch profile L8BV-6CF.

isabel-hallam.notes: Daughter of Louisa Ives Holmes & John Hallam. m. Richard Carr.

john-hallam-jr.notes: Son of Louisa Ives Holmes & John Hallam.

robert-hallam.notes: Son of Louisa Ives Holmes & John Hallam.

n-pedlar.notes: Spouse of Harry Northwood. First name unknown.

monica-hinde.notes: Spouse of Dr. Alfred Northwood. Name corrected from 'Hindes' to 'Hinde'. Two sisters: Beatrice and Gertrude. Died at Public General Hospital, Chatham.

helen-northwood.notes: Daughter of Harry Northwood & N. Pedlar. m. Chisholm.

kathleen-northwood.notes: Daughter of Harry Northwood & N. Pedlar. m. Edmonson Moore.

grace-northwood.notes: Daughter of Harry Northwood & N. Pedlar. m. Dobson.

occupation: Adjunct Emeritus Professor, University of Denver
paul-predecki.notes: Ph.D. in Metallurgy from MIT (1964). Specialties: advanced composite materials, aluminum alloys, corrosion science. Recipient of Charles S. Barrett Award.

georgie-may-schoff.notes: First wife of Clyde Sylvester Jones. Later remarried Louis Arthur Lips (1885-1963).

rollin-elwood-jones.notes: Son of Clyde Sylvester Jones & Georgie May Schoff. Died in infancy.

mr-rablee.notes: Second husband of Irene Rowe. First name unknown. Connected to 'George Nathan Rab[lee?]' notation on Photo 6.

ellen-rowe.notes: Spouse of Dr. Dale E. Rowe. Surname unknown.

alan-wright.notes: Spouse of Georgene M. Rowe. Of Albuquerque, NM.

stephanie-rowe.notes: Spouse of Edward F. Rowe (younger). Surname unknown.

mariette-thompson-1824.notes: m. H. Shedd. Corrected from 'Harriette' per IMG_3164.

charles-p-thompson-1827.notes: m. Wm. Bowes. Middle initial corrected from 'F.' to 'P.' per IMG_3164.

james-stevens.notes: Visible on poster-board family tree (IMG_4933). Possible descendant of Hattie Northwood & Doug Stevens.

betty-jane-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933, left side). Connected to unreadable male note. Marriage date possibly 5/1/1943.

charlotte-unknown-1926.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933, left side). Connected to male note possibly reading Charles. NOT the same as Charlotte Brown (1840-1894).

karen-anne-unknown.notes: Central figure on poster-board (IMG_4933), highlighted inside a drawn rectangle. Connected to husband (name unreadable) and children including Lauren. Marriage date possibly ~4/15/1965.

lauren-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933), positioned below the boxed Karen Anne family unit. Likely daughter of Karen Anne.

oliver-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933, center-right). Connected to female note possibly reading Diane/Diana. Possibly Oliver Stewart.

diane-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933). Connected to Oliver. Possibly Diane Stewart or Scott.

kimberly-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933, upper area). Possibly Kimberly Sue.

margaret-blanch-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933/4934). Prominent position suggests family matriarch in this branch. Connected to Marshall below.

marshall-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933/4934). Connected below Margaret Blanch. Possibly Marshall Elton.

alonzo-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, upper-left). Part of a column of male family members. If a Jones, could be a sibling of Clyde Edward Jones or from an earlier generation.

jonathan-unknown-jones.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, left side). Below Alonzo in the same column. Possibly Jones.

daniel-jones-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, center-left). The Jones surname is readable. May be a descendant of Clyde Edward Jones & Margaret Marie Crissey.

dorothy-unknown-jones.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, upper-left). May appear more than once. Possibly Dorothy Christine or Dorothy Jones.

constance-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, left). Part of the same family cluster as Alonzo, Jonathan, Dorothy.

kathleen-ann-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, center). Connected to Daniel Jones cluster.

evelyn-bertha-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, center). Part of a descendant cluster.

jordan-frances-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, center-lower). Positioned as a descendant in the tree.

dorene-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, lower-right). If surname is Frost, may connect to Edward Frost Rowe family line.

steve-unknown.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4934, lower-right). Near Dorene; possibly same family. Possibly Frost.

david-unknown-poster.notes: Visible on poster-board (IMG_4933/4934). Appears in right-side cluster near Margaret Blanch. NOT the same as David Michael Montgomery.
